description: Design a printable PCB housing (open-top box) with four internal standoffs and a USB port cutout. The main box must have external dimensions of 100mm (Length X) × 60mm (Width Y) × 30mm (Height Z) with a uniform 2mm wall and floor thickness, open at the top (Positive Z face). Include four cylindrical internal standoffs on the floor, each 6mm in diameter and 5mm high from the internal floor, spaced 80mm apart in X and 40mm apart in Y (centered in the box), with 2.5mm diameter through-holes passing through the posts and the box floor. Create a 12mm (Y) × 12mm (Z) USB port cutout on the right face (X = +50mm), centered horizontally with the bottom edge 5mm above the internal floor. Save the result as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/pcb_housing.FCStd.
